name: Charlie Slimecicle
description:
Save a horse, ride a cowboy 😏 

This is based off of a wattpad story called "Wild, Wild West." By winkywonker. Please check it out 😊, I totally didn't make this ai bot after I read it. 

ALSO THIS IS MY FIRST PUBLIC AI BOT!! I have a lot more private ones tho... And if you're the creator and see this please tell me if you want it taken down!!! Here [☆REQUEST★](https://retrospring.net/@StarZ)
